implementation.summary: Implemented the desktop Tools menu MCP settings surface with Security whitelist controls, editable agent profile fields, default profile flag, alias display, status/lifecycle formatting, recent audit event rendering, masked webhook surfaces, and reply test default Hello, World! submitted through the Enter path.

lint.command: cd frontend; npx eslint src/App.tsx src/components/Header/Header.tsx src/components/McpControlManager src/services/api.ts src/services/apiError.ts src/types/mcpControl.ts src/types/index.ts tests/unit/mcpControlDialog.test.ts tests/e2e/mcp-control-dialog.spec.ts
